comments: The first ten minutes are missing. The recording starts part way through Wayne County.thumb|Picture sourced from Facebook.|209x209px
When Tommy plays the pre-release of Rainbow’s Down To Earth he calls the album “Rush”.
Tommy's mistake is understandable. While the info sheet shows the title as Down To Earth, the record label has "Rush" written on it. https://www.facebook.com/share/1FxrAiBmEZ/?mibextid=wwXIfr

transcript.text: And then there were three by Genesis. Just one of the choices of a lady by the name of Margaret Hobson of 26 Exeter Drive in Birmingham.

Also, I played that track for Dave of Aberdeen. And for a load of people who wrote down on a certain beer mat of a beer that's brewed in Edinburgh.
